name: Schwarzkronenland
startIntroPart1: Heil Wahrheit Dir! Mein Schwarzfuhrer, Schwarzkronen Kriegskraft armies salute you! You are the greatest leader in our history, by your strong hand and sharp sword zhloorian race break the chains of slavery and marches to slaughter the world-wide Kurwinism and degeneration.
startIntroPart2: Now history calls you again, to secure the existence of our people, and future of Zhloorian children. will you build the civilization, that break the slavery again, exterminate herecy of Marxism, and will survive in the sandstorm of times?
declaringWar: We will make you see the falling of your terror, kurwinist!
attacked: Our Kriegskraft will destroy your pest-armies like an unstoppable killer-wave!
defeated: Finally, the greatest master-race nation is fall, dark era comes til the long time... we'll meet you again in Ragnarok...
introduction: Heil, I'm Schwarzfuhrer of great Schwarzkronenland, are you my enemy or allie?
hateHello: Mein Zhlooria... What do you want, kurwenknecher?
afterPeace: Next time you will be begging me to mercy.
declaringfriendship: Let's stand together for hailing victory!
